name: Etheric Elixir

effects.description: May cause hallucinations or temporary insight.

description: A stoppered vial of glowing blue liquid, said to enhance perception and stamina. Used by mediums and scientists.

artwork.caption: A glass vial with a faintly glowing liquid.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Potion of Heroism', reimagined for science.
